sn35.210-212:0.3: The Interior and What’s Not-Self in the Three Times
sn35.210-212:1.1: "Bhikkhus, the eye … the mind of the past … of the future … of the present is nonself. What is nonself should be seen as it really is with correct wisdom thus: ‘This is not mine, this I am not, this is not my self.’ Seeing thus … He understands: ‘ … there is no more for this state of being.’"
